positive: A breathtaking, minimalist celestial botanical composition featuring intertwined glowing crescent moons, detailed stylized bioluminescent florals, and meandering constellations of deep indigo ink. The arrangement should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed as a repeating graphic repeat suitable for apparel. The style is intricate etching mixed with modern glowing linework, utilizing a restricted palette of sapphire blue, soft gold, and ethereal white against a transparent background. High contrast, sharp vector quality, perfect silhouette.
